title: `links theme` — switch and list themes
description: Implement the `links theme` command for switching the active theme and listing available themes.

features: `links theme set <name>` — updates the theme field in links.yaml to the given theme name. Validates that the theme exists via listThemes(). Prints: '✓ Theme set to: <name>. Rebuild with: links deploy --self'
`links theme list` — lists all available themes, marking the currently active one with a ✓ checkmark. Uses listThemes() from src/themes/loader.js.
`links theme` with no subcommand — defaults to `links theme list` behavior
If theme name not found in listThemes(), print: 'Unknown theme: <name>. Run: links theme list' and exit 1
